title: WorkPlan
description: Contract between the planner (Goose) and the dispatcher. Produced by the planner recipe and validated before workflow execution proceeds.

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier. Must be '1.0' for this version.

summary.description: Brief human-readable summary of the work plan.

approach.description: Description of the overall approach the planner intends to take.

tasks.description: Ordered list of discrete tasks to execute.

files_likely_affected.description: List of file paths expected to be created or modified.

risks.description: List of identified risks or concerns.

questions_for_reviewer.description: Open questions the planner has for a human reviewer.

status.description: Planner confidence signal: 'pass' = ready to proceed, 'concerns' = proceed with caution, 'blocked' = cannot proceed.
